mapper.select:
select distinct node_name from (
select node_name from m_node_in_out_table where upper(input_tablename) = upper(#{tableName}) or upper(output_tablename) = upper(#{tableName})
select node_name from synuserprofile.SYNDT_IN_OUT_TABLE_ANALYZE where upper(table_name) =upper(#{tableName})
)
select sum(TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH) from( select TABLEUSECOUNTOFMONTH from storecycleanduseheat where upper(tablenameen) = upper(#{tableName}) order by lastdate desc ) where rownum = 1
